description_long: This is a semi-automatic handgun with a classic design, featuring a matte black metal slide and frame paired with wooden grip panels. The grip panels are a rich brown color, secured with a single brass screw on each side, and have a smooth finish. The handgun includes a visible trigger guard, hammer, and iron sights, with the magazine shown separately and loaded with a single visible round. The slide has subtle engravings and a slightly rounded profile, while the magazine is rectangular with a flat base and a small lip at the front. The overall construction suggests a robust, ergonomic firearm suitable for personal defense or law enforcement use.
description: A matte black semi-automatic handgun with smooth wooden grips and a separate, flat-based magazine. The design is classic and robust, with visible engravings and ergonomic features.
description_view_0: The handgun is viewed directly from the muzzle end, showing the circular barrel opening and the front sight post.
description_view_1: The left side of the handgun is visible, highlighting the wooden grip panel, trigger, hammer, and the separate magazine with a visible round.
description_view_2: The rear of the handgun is shown, displaying the hammer, rear sight, and the backstrap of the grip.
description_view_3: The right side of the handgun is visible, showing the opposite wooden grip panel, slide, and the magazine with its flat base.
attribute_grip_design: The grip features smooth, dark brown wooden panels with a subtle sheen, contoured to fit the hand comfortably. Each panel is secured by a single brass screw and lacks aggressive texturing, providing a classic, elegant appearance. The grip is slightly rounded at the edges, with no visible finger grooves or checkering, and does not display any logos or embellishments.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. It has a smooth finish with no visible texturing or reinforcement, and its curvature is traditional, lacking undercuts or squared-off edges. The design is simple and functional, without integrated accessories or distinctive styling.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, with a smooth, non-threaded exterior and a matte black finish. There are no visible ports, compensators, or fluting, and the muzzle is cleanly cut. The barrel blends seamlessly with the slide, and no special markings or external features are apparent.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features subtle engravings on the left side, including what appears to be a manufacturer name and possibly a model designation, rendered in a small, unobtrusive font. The markings are located just above the trigger area and are not highly prominent, blending into the matte black finish.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and rectangular with a slight lip at the front edge. It is finished in black, matching the magazine body, and does not feature any finger rests, logos, or texturing. The design is simple and functional, with clean lines and no embellishments.
